title: India-UK CETA: CBIC ने Rules of Origin के लिए Self-Certification Guidelines जारी कीं
content:
# India-UK CETA: CBIC ने Rules of Origin के लिए Self-Certification Guidelines जारी कीं

Ek important update hai! Government ne India-UK Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) ke तहत Rules of Origin ke self-certification system ko implement karne ke liye detailed operational guidelines announce kiye hain.

*   **Agreement Effective Date:** India-UK CETA 15 July 2026 se लागू हो रहा है.
*   **Guidelines Issued By:** Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne yeh detailed operational guidelines 13 July 2026 ko jaari ki hain.
*   **Self-Certification System:** Is naye system ke तहत, UK exporters ya producers goods ke origin ko khud certify kar sakte hain. Isse unhe India mein preferential Customs duty benefits milenge.
*   **Authentication Process:** Origin declarations ko authenticate kiya jayega. CBIC ne clarify kiya hai ki authentication sirf declaration ki genuineness confirm karega, lekin Customs authorities ab bhi imported goods ke rules of origin ko independently verify kar sakte hain. Digital authentication aur Unique Reference Number (URN) ki bhi requirement hogi.
*   **Transitory Provisions:** Jo consignments 15 July 2026 ko already transit mein hain ya Customs control mein hain, woh bhi preferential tariff treatment claim kar sakte hain, provided ki authenticated origin declaration 15 July 2026 ke baad furnish ki jaaye.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in)

*Published on: 14 July 2026*
